ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "loan_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant who submitted the loan application */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan product applied for */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan requested */,
  "loan_amount_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan application (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan application was submitted */,
  "application_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the application was submitted */,
  "decision_algorithm" TEXT /* Name or ID of the decision-making algorithm used to assess the application */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "married" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents of the applicant */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the applicant */,
  "self_employed" TEXT /* Employment status indicating if the applicant is self-employed */,
  "applicant_income" REAL /* Income of the applicant */,
  "coapplicant_income" REAL /* Income of the co-applicant if applicable */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the applicant */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number or equivalent for the applicant */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "history_length" INTEGER /* Length of the credit history in years */,
  "past_defaults" TEXT /* Record of past defaults if any */,
  "credit_report_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit report was generated */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Total credit limit across all credit accounts */,
  "credit_utilization" REAL /* Ratio of credit used to credit available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_details" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the applicant */,
  "employment_length" INTEGER /* Length of employment in years */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the applicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the current employment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_details_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_details" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "loan_id" TEXT /* Reference to the loan application */,
  "property_area" TEXT /* Area where the property is located */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "estimated_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the property */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property */,
  "property_usage" TEXT /* Intended usage of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_details_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate applicable to the loan product */,
  "max_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for the loan product */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan product in months */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the loan product */,
  "product_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the loan product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the terms and conditions */,
  "term_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the terms and conditions become effective */,
  "term_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the terms and conditions expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_terms_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the bank */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_disbursement" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disbursement */,
  "loan_id" TEXT /* Reference to the loan application */,
  "disbursement_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan disbursed */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was disbursed */,
  "payment_schedule" TEXT /* Payment schedule for the loan */,
  "disbursement_method" TEXT /* Method of disbursement */,
  "disbursement_status" TEXT /* Status of the disbursement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_disbursement_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)
